mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, room_id, checkin_date, expected_checkout_date, checkout_date, checkout_reason, status, created_at FROM residences WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, employee_id, room_id, checkin_date, expected_checkout_date, checkout_date, checkout_reason, status, created_at FROM residences WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO residences (employee_id, room_id, checkin_date, expected_checkout_date, status, created_at) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{roomId}, #{checkinDate}, #{expectedCheckoutDate}, 'active', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, employee_id, room_id, checkin_date, expected_checkout_date, checkout_date, checkout_reason, status, created_at FROM residences WHERE (status = 'active' OR (status = 'checked_out' AND DATE_FORMAT(checkout_date, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth})) AND DATE_FORMAT(checkin_date, '%Y-%m') <= #{yearMonth}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residences WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 'active'
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MAX(checkout_date), '%Y-%m-%d') FROM residences WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND checkout_date IS NOT NULL

SELECT id, employee_id, room_id, checkin_date, expected_checkout_date, checkout_date, checkout_reason, status, created_at FROM residences WHERE status = 'active' AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, checkin_date, CURDATE()) >= #{thresholdYears}
SELECT id, employee_id, room_id, checkin_date, expected_checkout_date, checkout_date, checkout_reason, status, created_at FROM residences WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY checkin_date

SELECT r.id AS roomId, COUNT(res.id) AS residentCount FROM rooms r LEFT JOIN residences res ON res.room_id = r.id AND res.status = 'active' WHERE r.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY r.id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residences r INNER JOIN rooms rm ON rm.id = r.room_id AND rm.is_deleted = 0 WHERE rm.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND r.status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residences WHERE status = 'active'
